citation.source: Life Insurance Association of Malaysia (LIAM) — Critical Illness Claims Statistics
citation.quote: Average claim payout for cancer across life-insurer members trends between RM120,000 and RM250,000 depending on treatment stage and modality.
citation.locator: LIAM Annual Report 2023, Critical Illness Claims Chapter

citation.source: General Insurance Association of Malaysia (PIAM) — Hospitalisation Cost Benchmarks
citation.quote: Acute myocardial infarction and stent placement at private hospitals typically costs RM70,000–RM150,000 including ICU stay.

citation.source: Malaysian Takaful Association (MTA) — Total Permanent Disability Claims Review
citation.quote: Long-term care and income-replacement costs for total permanent disability average RM200,000–RM350,000 over a ten-year horizon.
citation.locator: MTA Industry Statistics 2023, Disability Claims Section

citation.source: Life Insurance Association of Malaysia (LIAM) — Death Benefit Claims Statistics
citation.quote: Average death-benefit payouts for primary-earner policies span RM100,000–RM300,000 depending on sum assured and rider attachments.
citation.locator: LIAM Annual Report 2023, Death Benefit Claims Chapter
